spec.config:
receivers:
  otlp:
    protocols:
      grpc:
        endpoint: 0.0.0.0:4317
      http:
        endpoint: 0.0.0.0:4318
  filelog:
    include:
      - /var/log/pods/*/*/*.log
    exclude:
      - /var/log/pods/*/otel-collector/*.log
    storage: file_storage
    operators:
      - type: regex_parser
        regex: '^(?P<time>[^ ]+) (?P<stream>stdout|stderr) (?P<logtag>[^ ]*) (?P<log>.*)$'

processors:
  memory_limiter:
    check_interval: 1s
    limit_percentage: 80
    spike_limit_percentage: 25
  k8sattributes:
    extract:
      metadata:
        - k8s.pod.name
        - k8s.namespace.name
        - k8s.deployment.name
      labels:
        - tag_name: app
          key: app.kubernetes.io/name
    pod_association:
      - sources:
          - from: resource_attribute
            name: k8s.pod.ip
  resourcedetection:
    detectors: [env, gcp]
  batch:
    send_batch_size: 8192
    timeout: 5s
  tail_sampling:
    decision_wait: 10s
    num_traces: 50000
    policies:
      - name: error-sampling
        type: status_code
        status_code:
          status_codes: [ERROR]
      - name: slow-traces
        type: latency
        latency:
          threshold_ms: 5000

connectors:
  spanmetrics:
    histogram:
      explicit:
        buckets: [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 50, 100, 200, 400, 800, 1000, 5000]
    dimensions:
      - name: http.method
      - name: http.status_code
      - name: service.name
    metrics_flush_interval: 15s

exporters:
  otlp:
    endpoint: tempo:4317
    tls:
      insecure: true

extensions:
  file_storage:
    directory: /var/lib/otelcol/storage

service:
  extensions: [file_storage]
  pipelines:
    traces:
      receivers: [otlp]
      processors: [memory_limiter, k8sattributes, tail_sampling, batch]
      exporters: [spanmetrics, otlp]
    metrics:
      receivers: [otlp, spanmetrics]
      processors: [memory_limiter, k8sattributes, batch]
      exporters: [otlp]
    logs:
      receivers: [filelog]
      processors: [memory_limiter, k8sattributes, resourcedetection, batch]
      exporters: [otlp]
